steps.title: Identify the setup function
steps.content: The underlined statement says elephants and Arctic herbivores often have fixed geographic ranges. The text immediately says this led researchers to wonder whether Arctic woolly mammoths had similar fixed-range behavior. That opening comparison supplies the rationale for the researchers' expectation before the tusk evidence is introduced.

steps.title: Connect to later data
steps.content: B invents a theory about exceptions, C falsely says the later method failed, and D invents a hypothesis about the origin of the trait. Later tusk data shows one mammoth's range changed during life, so the opening characteristic explains a possibility later unsupported for that specimen. The answer is A.
